channel.title: Bazel on YoSQL - write more SQL
channel.description: Recent content in Bazel on YoSQL - write more SQL

item.title: Bazel
item.description: bazel users can use the yosql-cli in their builds by following the steps. Replace placeholders with values from the actual release notes. Add git repository to your WORKSPACE: git_repository( name = "yosql", remote = "https://github.com/metio/yosql.git", tag = "0.0.1-bazel", ) Write .sql files in a directory of your choice (e.g. persistence) project/ ├── WORKSPACE ├── BUILD └── persistence/ └── user/ ├── findUser.sql └── addUser.sql └── item/ ├── queryAllItems.sql └── createItemTable.
